thread.title_full: Starting next year, the maternity leave period for "public servant fathers" will be doubled. Vacatio.. - MK

title: Starting next year, the maternity leave period for "public servant fathers" will be doubled. Vacatio.. - MK
text:
Starting next year, the maternity leave period for "public servant fathers" will be doubled. Vacation days for caring for premature babies will also be expanded, and the revised regulations will take effect early next year.
The Ministry of Personnel Management announced on the 24th that it has announced legislation to revise the service regulations for national public officials.
When a civil servant's spouse gives birth, the spouse's maternity leave that can be used as a father will increase from 10 days to 20 days. The purpose is to support the spouse to take sufficient care of mothers and newborns after giving birth.
In addition, if the spouse gives birth to an premature baby and the baby is admitted to the neonatal intensive care unit, the spouse's maternity leave will be expanded from the current 90 days to 100 days.
Spouse maternity leave can be used within 90 days from the date of birth.
Even if a public official who gave birth to a spouse has already used all of the current 10 days of leave, it will be applied retroactively if 90 days have not passed since the birth based on the effective date of the amendment. According to the revised regulations, you can take an additional vacation for an increasing number of days.
The revision of the service regulations will be implemented after pre-announcement of legislation, review by the Ministry of Legislation, and resolution by the State Council. Usually, it takes about 90 days to make a resolution at the Cabinet meeting.
